Deployed Live · Star Agile Training · AWS us-east-1 · Oct 28 2024

Banking CI/CD
Full DevOps Pipeline

A Java Spring Boot banking app deployed from git push to live in 3 min 23 seconds — fully automated with Jenkins · Docker · Terraform · Ansible — monitored with Prometheus & Grafana.

☕ Java Spring Boot 🔧 Jenkins 2.462.3 🐳 Docker 25.0.5 📜 Ansible 2.15.3 🏗 Terraform 1.9.8 ☁ AWS EC2 📦 Maven 3.9.9 🔥 Prometheus 2.53.2 📊 Grafana v11.3.0 📡 Node Exporter 1.8.2
7
Pipeline Stages
3m 23s
Build #4 Time
3
EC2 Instances
2/2 UP
Prom Targets
40
Screenshots
Project Overview

What Was Built & Deployed

A complete end-to-end DevOps pipeline for a real banking web application — live on AWS with full monitoring. Everything automated. Zero manual steps.

🏢

Banking Application

Java Spring Boot "Customer Banking Services" containerized as jhansi977/banking-project-demo:1.0 (696MB), running via java -jar /app.jar on port 8084.

🔄

7-Stage Jenkins Pipeline

Git clone → Maven build → Test reports → Docker build → Login → Push to DockerHub → Terraform EC2 → Ansible deploy. GitHub webhook triggers on every push.

🏗

Terraform — IaC

Provisions fresh AWS EC2 t2.micro inside Jenkins. init → validate → apply. hashicorp/aws v5.73.0. EC2 created in 1 min 26 sec. IP auto-written to Ansible inventory.

📜

Ansible — Config & Deploy

Playbook SSHes into fresh EC2: yum update → install Docker → start service → run container. Result: ok=5 changed=4 failed=0 unreachable=0.

🔥

Prometheus Monitoring

Prometheus 2.53.2 on dedicated monitoring EC2 (54.91.220.8). Scrapes node_exporter at 52.55.21.187:9100 every 15s. Both targets UP.

📊

Grafana Dashboards

Grafana v11.3.0 at 54.91.220.8:3000. Connected to Prometheus. Live "Server Metrics — CPU/Memory/Disk/Network" dashboard. "Successfully queried the Prometheus API."

BankingProject · Build #4 · Oct 28 · 17:27

Pipeline Stage by Stage

Real Jenkinsfile stages with actual timings and commands — all 7 stages GREEN in Build #4.

Docker Image

Config & Deploy
3m 3s
01

Jenkins EC2 Setup

i-0fbe600dbd28f8da3 · 50.17.98.208:8080 · t2.medium · Amazon Linux · us-east-1
Jenkins 2.462.3 · Java 17 Corretto · Maven 3.9.9 · JAVA_HOME + M2_HOME in .bashrc
git 2.40.1 · Docker 25.0.5 · Ansible 2.15.3 · Terraform 1.9.8 installed
usermod -aG docker jenkins · systemctl enable docker · sudoers: jenkins ALL=NOPASSWD:ALL
Credentials: Docker-login (jhansi977) · terraform-ansible (SSH PEM) · AWS-ID
02

Build 12 seconds

Clone repo + Maven build Spring Boot JAR
git 'https://github.com/Jhansi-112/Banking-CI-CD-Pipeline.git'
sh "mvn -Dmaven.test.failure.ignore=true clean package"
03

Test Reports + Docker Build/Login/Push ~6s

publishHTML surefire-reports · docker build :1.0 · docker login · docker push
docker build -t jhansi977/banking-project-demo:1.0 . (696MB image)
docker push jhansi977/banking-project-demo:1.0 → Tags: 1.0 + 3.0 live on DockerHub
04

Config & Deployment — Terraform + Ansible 3 min 3 sec

Provision fresh EC2 from Jenkins, then Ansible deploys Docker container
chmod 600 mykey-project.pem → terraform init (hashicorp/aws v5.73.0) → validate → apply --auto-approve
EC2 created: i-0a71acc8b0b2edcb5 · IP: 52.55.21.187 · t2.micro · Running (1m 26s)
Ansible: ok=5 changed=4 unreachable=0 failed=0 · docker run -itd -p 8084:8081 ...demo:1.0
Container: 0c8064116d89 (exciting_morse) · Up · http://52.55.21.187:8084 LIVE!
05

Monitoring — Prometheus + Node Exporter + Grafana

Monitoring EC2: i-0cfc4717d4c4bfdc5 · 54.91.220.8 · Prometheus 2.53.2 + Grafana v11.3.0
Prometheus 2.53.2 scraping node_exporter 52.55.21.187:9100 every 15s → both targets UP
node_exporter 1/1 UP (16ms) · prometheus 1/1 UP (5.78ms)
Grafana → Prometheus datasource → "Successfully queried the Prometheus API."
Dashboard: Server Metrics CPU/Memory/Disk/Network · Host: 52.55.21.187:9100 live

Real-Time Observability

Monitoring Stack

Prometheus scraping live system metrics from the banking server. Grafana showing CPU, Memory, Load, Disk, Network in real-time.

🔥

Prometheus Targets — Both UP

● node_exporter (1/1 up)

52.55.21.187:9100 · Last scrape: 13.8s · Duration: 16ms

● prometheus (1/1 up)

54.91.220.8:9090 · Last scrape: 8.4s · Duration: 5.78ms

📡

Node Exporter 1.8.2

Running on test-server at 52.55.21.187:9100. Collecting: node_disk_io_time, node_disk_reads_completed, node_cpu_seconds_total, node_memory — all live at /metrics endpoint.

📊

Grafana Dashboard Live

Dashboard: "Server Metrics — CPU/Memory/Disk/Network"
CPU ~100% idle · Memory 0–1.13 GiB · Load 0–0.06 · Disk: / ~20% · /boot/efi ~5%
Interval: 1m · Last 15 minutes

🔗

Grafana Data Source

URL: http://54.91.220.8:9090
Default datasource · HTTP method: POST
✓ "Successfully queried the Prometheus API."

③ Docker Registry

④ Terraform — Infrastructure as Code
Terraform Config (terraform-files/)
provider.tf: region = "us-east-1"
main.tf: aws_instance "test-server"
  ami = ami-06b21ccaeff8cd686
  instance_type = t2.micro
  key_name = mykey-project
  sg = sg-060316f6d3f0dec32
local-exec 1: echo public_ip > inventory
local-exec 2: ansible-playbook ...yml
Provider: hashicorp/aws v5.73.0
→terraform apply
New EC2 Created — test-server
Instance ID: i-0a71acc8b0b2edcb5
Public IP: 52.55.21.187
Private IP: 172.31.44.226
Type: t2.micro · Amazon Linux
Created in: 1m 26s
State: ✅ Running

ansibleplaybook.yml
ansible.cfg · inventory
remote_user: ec2-user
ok=5 · changed=4 · failed=0
→SSH via PEM

Task 2: sudo yum install docker -y
Task 3: sudo systemctl start docker

Complete Flow Summary
git push → GitHub Webhook → Jenkins Triggered → Maven Build (12s) → Docker Build + Push → Terraform init/validate/apply → EC2 Created (1m26s) → Ansible SSH → Install Docker → Container Running → 🎉 App Live at 52.55.21.187:8084 → Node Exporter → Prometheus → Grafana → 📊 Dashboards Live
Total Pipeline: 3 min 23 sec
EC2 Instances: 2 (Jenkins + Monitoring)
Stages: 7 (all ✅)
Ansible: ok=5, changed=4, failed=0
Prom Targets: 2/2 UP
Region: AWS us-east-1 (N. Virginia)
Jenkins/Git/DockerHub
Ansible
Terraform
Live Application
Prometheus
Grafana

Debugging and Problem Solving

Real Issues I Solved

Actual production-level problems encountered and fixed during this project — not theory.

IssueRoot CauseFix Applied
Jenkins could not run Docker/TerraformJenkins user had no sudo permissionsFixed jenkins ALL=NOPASSWD: ALL in visudo
Ansible did not run after TerraformInventory not updated with new EC2 IPFixed local-exec: echo public_ip > inventory then triggers ansible-playbook
Terraform SSH connection failed to EC2PEM file permissions too open (644)Fixed sudo chmod 600 mykey-project.pem before apply
Docker push: authentication requiredCredentials not injected in pipelineFixed withCredentials([usernamePassword(credentialsId: 'Docker-login'...)])
Grafana showed No Data on dashboardPrometheus datasource URL was wrongFixed Set URL to http://54.91.220.8:9090 in Grafana datasource settings
Node Exporter not scraped by PrometheusWrong IP in prometheus.yml scrape configFixed Updated target to 52.55.21.187:9100
App not responding on expected portApp runs on 8081 internally, not 8080Fixed Ansible: docker run -itd -p 8084:8081 ...banking-project-demo:1.0

⭐ Explore This Project

Built from scratch by Jhansi — passionate DevOps engineer from Hyderabad. Every command, every config, every fix — done by hand.
